channel.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - github

item.title: Project Update: AnalysisToolbox
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Recent activity in AnalysisToolbox:

Recent Commits

  • a774319 feat: add zscore criterion for sample rejection; update parquet compression to g
  • c8febc1 fix: update configuration file references in pipelineBuilder documentation
  • a871b11 fix: update l2_folder parameter initialization to avoid undefined warnings
  • 29d98ef fix: remove duplicate pipeline_log def in finalizeParticipant; add pipeline buil
  • 6b64038 Enhance .gitignore handling: untrack Nextflow trace and local runtime files

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →
